review_metadata.review_target: Phase 2 (source project exploration) outputs of Methodology Extraction Methodology project
review_metadata.independence_claim: This review did not participate in the design or execution of the target project; based on retained Phase 2 files and original source project files.

read_source_artifacts: 项目E-analysis/项目E_综合评估报告.md
项目E-analysis/项目E_项目闭合记录.md
read_source_claude_md: 中国A股公司学术案例项目/CLAUDE.md

overall_verdict.interpretation: Between 5.5-7.0: revise then proceed to Phase 3

finding_assessments.assessment: Partially real but exaggerated as evolutionary narrative. Time-ordered structural differences exist, but 'five components' label for 项目P and 'six-step closed loop' for 项目E lack textual support. 项目L's own methodology/framework.md is highly structured, contradicting the 'unstructured embedded' label.

sub_assessments.note: Plausible but suffers from hindsight bias and selection bias; success-project counterexamples not excluded.
Mostly credible but binary split oversimplifies; boundary between factual and reasoning errors is fuzzy.

sub_assessments.pattern: 失败→方法论资产流水线
sub_assessments.note: Strongest pattern, but naming is too broad and not all 'failed' projects show complete four-step pipeline.

sub_assessments.pattern: 证据等级意识自然收敛
sub_assessments.note: Likely diffusion from common source (framework §9.6) rather than spontaneous convergence; grade definitions may differ.

finding_assessments.finding_title: Batch 1 vs Batch 2 本质差异
finding_assessments.assessment: Framework is reasonable but overstates domain essence. Simpler explanation: time-order + learning effect + availability of framework extraction template. Batch 1's 学术案例项目 playbook v1.2 is as mature as Batch 2 transfers in its own domain.

项目A claim holds. 项目L claim needs correction: 项目L has highly structured project-internal methodology docs; its low score conflates 'cross-project transfer extraction' with 'project-internal methodology documentation'.

Most important and valid finding, but Phase 2 did not implement mitigations: no discount factor for AI-extracted value, no replication by different backend, no separation of source-project claim vs extractor claim. 项目E 9.4/10 while source project is 4.1-4.2/10 exemplifies this risk.

q1_q7_summary.Q1_format_evolution: Time-ordered description mostly real; 'evolution' narrative and specific labels ('five components', 'six-step closed loop') are post-hoc rationalization.
q1_q7_summary.Q2_cross_batch_patterns: Pattern 3 strongest; Pattern 1 and 4 weakest due to bias and diffusion effects.
q1_q7_summary.Q3_batch_differences: Simpler explanation exists: time-order + learning effect + template availability. Not sufficiently excluded.
q1_q7_summary.Q4_quality_ranking: Unreasonable due to anchoring, recency bias, and decoupling of extraction quality from source-project quality. 项目E 9.4/10 is overestimated; 项目L 5.0/10 underestimated.
Q5_omissions: Post-hoc Phase 0 addition not generalized as anti-pattern
项目L and 学术案例项目 undervalued; 项目E overvalued
Minimum evidence package misses memory files and framework-mapping checks
120+ fragments likely inflated by duplicate expressions
q1_q7_summary.Q6_phase3_recommendation: GO WITH FIXES: formalize evidence cards, re-audit Batch 1 extraction maturity, replace single-point ranking with multi-dimensional rubric, and replicate at least 2 extractions with different backend.
Q7_prompt_bias: Questions embed candidate answers (e.g., 'is it post-hoc rationalization?', 'is there anchoring effect?')
Independence claim may obscure actual prior exposure to reviewed projects
Adversarial framing against DeepSeek-V4-Pro may induce criticism for its own sake

mandatory_fixes_before_phase3: 将 Workflow 输出的 120+ 方法论片段形式化为可审计的独立证据卡文件（.md + .json）
重新审计 Batch 1 项目的方法论提取成熟度，尤其是学术案例项目的 playbook v1.2 和量化策略项目的终期总结/纪律清单
用多维度 rubric 替代单点质量排名，至少包含：结构完整性、证据等级、独立审查、可迁移性、边界诚实性、源项目质量折扣
recommended_parallel_work: 用不同后端模型（Kimi/Qwen）对至少 2 个项目独立复现方法论提取，估计提取者效应
对 120+ 片段进行聚类/去重，给出独特模式数量估计

key_evidence_index.role: 项目L project-internal methodology doc is highly structured
